purpose: Zero-VRAM, integer-only mask/alias/Villager generator. Mirrors the CKDOG1 soul model natively in Python: from a SHA-256 seed (joined villager refs, capped 5000) it deterministically mints 12 fixed core ProceduralSlots (slot_index,name=Villager-NNNN,alias=Alias-xxxx,persona in {ledger,runner,witness,archivist,carrier,scribe},uuid,ternary_offset) plus N fluid/domain slots (default 88). ternary_offset is -1/0/+1 derived from psyche_wrath_velocity vs psyche_forensic_shield_ratio. NOT 'Persephone'; this is the mask-router/cypher/domain-ontology substrate.
inputs: villagers: Sequence[str] (alias/backstory seeds, <=5000); psyche_wrath_velocity: float; psyche_forensic_shield_ratio: float; fluid_slots: int=88
outputs: dict schema lucidota.percyphon.procedural_entity_generator.v1 {slots[12], fluid_slots[N], ternary_offset, zero_vram:true} -- procedural scaffold only, explicitly 'identity masks are procedural and not model-generated'
graph_safety: safe: pure deterministic SHA arithmetic, no DB, no model call, no canonical write; output is scaffold candidate not truth
next_action: Exercised by math/validation/test_four_pillars.py; rust_port candidate (mirrors doggystyle CKDOG1 kernel). Keep as the canonical native mask/Villager substrate.

purpose: Frozen dataclass representing one core mask slot: slot_index, name (Villager-NNNN), alias, persona, uuid, ternary_offset. The literal unit of a mask/alias identity. as_dict() serializes.

Routes a Percyphon procedural scaffold through the Diogenes control-packet gate. Calls procedural_entity_generator, wraps slot[0] with authority='procedural_scaffold_candidate_not_truth', DENIES unless authority_class=='operator_authored_assertion', builds a kernel control packet (capability=absurd_enqueue, canonical_mutation_allowed=False), routes it via route_plan_from_packet, and writes a receipt to 05_OUTPUTS/diogenes/.
inputs: raw_command, normalized_intent, authority_class, source, villagers[], fluid_slots:int=8, queue_name, lane
outputs: receipt JSON lucidota.diogenes.percyphon_kernel_bridge.v1 (status ROUTED|DENIED|BLOCKED) at 05_OUTPUTS/diogenes/percyphon_kernel_bridge_<ts>.json; canonical_graph_writes_performed:false, model_calls_performed:false
graph_safety: safe by construction: hard-codes canonical_mutation_allowed=False and refuses non-operator authority; enqueue-only via ABSURD lane
next_action: Has no in-repo caller (CLI/manual only). Wire into the queue spine or mark keep-Python; it is the authorized ingress for Percyphon scaffolds.

purpose: LUCIDOTA-native (NOT doggystyle) control-packet router. Verifies a control packet signature, rejects replays via the packet ledger, and on success emits a ROUTED plan (route_id, lane, queue_name, idempotency_key, canonical_mutation_allowed) and appends a kernel.route_plan.created event. This is the deterministic hash-routing gate Percyphon scaffolds pass through.
inputs: packet: dict (with packet_hash, payload), purpose:str, ledger_path, event_log
outputs: dict {status:ROUTED|DENIED, packet_hash, route_id, ...}; ledger + event side effects to 05_OUTPUTS/kernel/control_packet_ledger.jsonl
graph_safety: safe: routing/ledger only; canonical_mutation_allowed faithfully echoed but no canonical write performed here
next_action: Custody/queue authority -> CLAUDE.md says authority/queues belong in Rust. Register in rust_port_candidacy_registry.json.

purpose: Separately-maintained external CKDOG1 kernel: high-velocity ontological graph kernel for low-resource orchestration (<50MB RSS). Interface (python -m kernel.cli): genesis-init/policy-control (USER_CONTROLLED|SELF_REACTIVE, immutable after genesis), ROOT-414 global anchors, up to 5000 soul-bearing villager UUIDs, 12 core trait slots + 88 domain ontology slots per active soul, temporal delta-stream (hashes only), trinary route state -1/0/+1, Valhalla burn archive, local-only ONNX semantic-route. Routes by exact fields/hashes/policy/cost/proof, NEVER by English/emoji/metaphor. This is the conceptual parent of ALGOS/percyphon.py (12+88 slots, trinary, SHA routing).
inputs: CLI: genesis-init, init-ontology, soul-create, trait-set, domain-slot-set, state-shift, delta-apply, semantic-route, route, soul-burn, bench-packed
outputs: route trace hashes, packed integer slot refs, append-only event journal, SQLite/packed soul store
graph_safety: external; DO NOT modify here. LUCIDOTA does not write its canonical graph via this kernel.
deps: self-contained python kernel package; optional [semantic] ONNX MiniLM (not bundled)
next_action: REFERENCE-ONLY: grep of scripts/ALGOS/lucidota_etl shows ZERO imports of the doggystyle kernel package and ZERO invocations of `python -m kernel.cli`. LUCIDOTA reimplements its concepts natively (percyphon.py + scripts/ckdog_kernel_*). Treat as design reference / rust-port north star, not a live dependency. Do not modify.

purpose: Runtime contract binding Percyphon to Indy_READs hunch signals. States: Percyphon can attach stable procedural slots to operator hunch leads and Subtle Knife cut records for cheap coordination; every procedural routing cut must point to a receipt/log and never bypass graph promotion; slots/masks are scaffolds only -- no generated villager/entity becomes a factual claim. Authority: operator_hunch_signal_and_cut_seal_protocol_not_canonical_truth.
inputs: operator-labeled hunches (Ponyboy hunch record: 34 right/2 inconclusive/0 wrong), Subtle Knife Protocol v1.0 sources (hashed)
graph_safety: safe: declarative contract; explicit truth_boundary forbids promoting scaffolds to fact

purpose: 16-line shim re-exporting villager_status_core from KRAMPUSCHEWING/Script_Corpses for villager status receipts.
next_action: Core lives in Script_Corpses (archived). Verify if still referenced; otherwise leave archived.

purpose: THE big packed multi-algo 'validator' file the operator warned about (14KB, 114 lines). Packs ~88 numbered equation validators (EQ-002..EQ-100, excluding the 8 in validators.py) registered via _reg/@_reg into the shared validators.register registry. Most are one-line lambdas; helpers _bool (boolean->PASS/FAIL via _res ge 1.0) and _ratio (safe division). ALGO_MANIFEST.md indexes this file at FILE level only ('Additional registered validator equations') -- it does NOT enumerate the individual EQ rows. Each EQ-### below is a NEW function-level algorithm row not in ALGO_MANIFEST.
inputs: register(eq_id) decorator pattern; each EQ takes named kwargs (see per-EQ rows)
graph_safety: safe: pure scoring/gating, no DB or graph write
next_action: ADD the ~88 EQ rows to ALGO_MANIFEST.md at function level (manifest only had the file). Big multi-algo file -- candidate for slop review (PocketFlow yardstick) but it is dense registrations, not bloat.

purpose: PASS iff <=1 distinct actor in actor_set (single-writer law)
max answer vote share / k >=0.6 (self-consistency confidence)
PASS iff steel-man has >=1 evidence cite, quality>=0.7, passes self-consistency
PASS iff new model beats old: dF1>=0.03, ECE<=, latency<=budget, adv_f1>=0.85, ram<=pool budget
share of concepts_used present in global_vocab ==1.0
PASS iff no new concept yamls OR companion RFC ratified
PASS iff all kwargs truthy (generic conjunction gate)
PASS iff law functions do NOT import the soul field (CKDOG soul/law separation)
share of required_fields present in provided_fields ==1.0
PASS iff required_evidence subset of attached_evidence
PASS iff dismissal has cited disproof and falsification criteria met
PASS iff word_count>=100, counter_evidence>=1, passes SC vote
PASS iff outbound contains no banned identifier (PII leak gate)
PASS iff asset scope within consent, consent active, not expired
flag (=1) if claims_per_kb>5 and observed_ratio<0.5, must be <=0
max over actions of min(utility) >=0 (maximin robustness)
0 if subject class not allowed else match_confidence*case_basis_strength >=0.7
PASS iff subject class allowed, source tier permitted, case_id present
PASS iff execute, or disprove_with_evidence with cites>0 and falsification met
0 if SAFETY_GATE else float(vibes-pattern refusal with no cites) <=0
PASS iff all kwargs true or >=0.95 (packet_strength >=0.8)
PASS iff all flags true except quarantine_active which must be false
PASS iff executed_and_ledgered OR disproved with evidence+cites+falsification
Placeholder equation slots registered as always-PASS (lambda **kw: True) or all-flags-conjunction; reserve numbers in the EQ-001..100 namespace pending real logic
next_action: Stubs only -- flag to operator: these EQ numbers are reserved but not yet implemented.

purpose: The validator registry core: ValidationResult dataclass (passed/equation_id/score/threshold/margin/__str__), register(eq_id,name) decorator + _REGISTRY, _res(eq,score,threshold,pass_if) result builder, and validate(eq_id_or_name,**kw) dispatcher. Ships 8 core EQ validators inline. validators_extended imports register/_res from here.

THE other big packed file (32KB, ~670 lines) -- the GTX-1650 4GB VRAM governor math. Packs ~22 top-level defs/classes for VRAM slot planning, dual-engine residency, LoRA hot-swap, preemption + flash eviction, and governor-decision persistence. ALGO_MANIFEST.md lists this file ONCE ('VRAM slot planning, dual-engine residency, preemption + flash eviction'); each function below is a NEW function-level row.
inputs: payload/state dicts, LoRA manifests from LORA_DIR, nvidia-smi gpu memory
outputs: VramSlotPlan / DualEngineResidencyPlan / RuntimePreemptionReceipt dicts; runtime receipts; optional Postgres governor_decision row
db_tables: governor decision row via persist_governor_decision (lucidota_state, loadout gtx1650-special-forces-v0)
graph_safety: receipt_only / external_effect (writes runtime receipts + can persist a governor decision via conn; no canonical graph write)
next_action: ADD function-level rows below to ALGO_MANIFEST. Long-running VRAM governor -> CLAUDE.md says Rust owns governors; register rust_port candidacy.

purpose: Dataclasses for one VRAM slot action plan, a preemption receipt, and a dual-engine residency plan; each as_dict() serializes
Query nvidia-smi for total/used/free VRAM MB (anti-ghost telemetry source)
Plan which engines (llama RAM/GPU, Mamba RAM/GPU) co-reside within the 4GB VRAM envelope
Load LoRA cartridge manifests from 04_RUNTIME LORA_DIR and resolve adapter file paths
outputs: list of manifest dicts / adapter Paths

purpose: Select which LoRA adapters to apply given payload/state (cartridge selection)
Detect mtime snapshot tag; compute LoRA context token ceiling for the loadout
Plan load/evict slot actions to fit selected LoRA adapters in VRAM (preemption planner, optional include_gpu)
Persist a governor decision plan to Postgres (loadout gtx1650-special-forces-v0) and return decision id
graph_safety: custody/receipt write (state DB only, no graph)
next_action: add to ALGO_MANIFEST; confirm DB target table name

purpose: Evict transient embedding context after vector generation; emit RuntimePreemptionReceipt
Context manager + helper: run an embed encoder in a flash lane then immediately evict context (4GB-envelope flash-embed pattern)
Build llama.cpp CLI/server args for LoRA application (init_without_apply for hot attach)
Flush/reap llama.cpp KV-cache context over HTTP to reclaim VRAM
Hot-swap a LoRA adapter on the running llama.cpp server without full reload
'Neo knows kung fu': load a LoRA cartridge into context for an instant skill, run, then drop -- composes select_adapters + hot_swap + reaper for ephemeral capability injection

1817-byte pytest that imports ALGOS.percyphon.procedural_entity_generator, core.language_membrane (route_inbound_text/weave_output) and core.telemetry.diogenes -- proves Percyphon + language router + telemetry pillars together. This is the live wiring path that makes Percyphon 'active' not 'lying around'.
Anti-ghost telemetry test: TelemetrySanityGate + safe_numeric_metrics_from_text parse real nvidia-smi output (GTX 1650) so the cockpit cannot mirror fake green metrics.

One-algo-per-file SHIMS (bayes_update, doomsday_calendar, gini_coefficient, rsa_cipher, shannon_entropy) that each do 'from ALGOS.<name> import *' -- they expose ALGOS primitives under the pypeline.math.algos namespace. No new logic; canonical impls live in ALGOS/.
next_action: Already in ALGO_MANIFEST at ALGOS level; note these are thin shims, not duplicates.
